[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 00111000 3
2 10110011 5
3 10011101 5
4 10101100 4
5 11001101 5
6 10110111 6
7 11111010 6

70 11111111 a
